title: Weeks, Brucker & Coleman, Ltd | Legal Services ransomware incident

victim.name: Weeks, Brucker & Coleman, Ltd | Legal Services

extortion.description: Weeks, Brucker & Coleman, Ltd internal network was attacked by our group. During the incident, more than 150GB of internal important data were exfiltrated to our servers, including internal and confidential information https://www.weeksbrucker.com/
